username.title: Whisker Email
username.description: Preferred. The email address used to sign in to the Ting app.

password.title: Whisker Password
password.description: Preferred. The password used to sign in to the Ting app.

telemetryEnabled.title: Send Anonymous Usage Data (Not Recommended to Disable)
telemetryEnabled.description: Optional. Not recommended to disable; helpful for future development; no personal data. Sends anonymous aggregate telemetry events if Telemetry Endpoint URL is also configured. No Whisker credentials, API keys, user IDs, site IDs, serial numbers, names, or addresses are sent.

telemetryEndpointUrl.title: Telemetry Endpoint URL
telemetryEndpointUrl.description: Cloudflare Worker /events URL for anonymous telemetry.
